pullRequests.title: Wait for webhooks to be ready during e2e test setup
pullRequests.body:
The e2e test setup is currently too fast causing the statefulset `kafka-source-dispatcher` to be created before the webhook `pods.defaulting.webhook.kafka.eventing.knative.dev` was configured by deployment `kafka-webhook-eventing` to contain rules that would modify the pods created by the statefulset.

Workaround: Wait for the webhook to contain the expected rules.
Actual fix: Discuss with eventing-kafka-broker maintainers whether we can add an initial `rules` field to https://github.com/knative-extensions/eventing-kafka-broker/blob/main/control-plane/config/eventing-kafka-broker/200-webhook/400-webhook-pod-defaulting.yaml

## Changes
- Add `kubectl wait` in `install_sources_crds()` to wait for webhook rules to be populated before applying Kafka Source YAML
- Minor formatting/indentation cleanup in test setup scripts
- Add debug sleep in E2E test to investigate teardown timing issues

Related to https://github.com/knative-extensions/eventing-kafka-broker/pull/4576 

/cc @gauron99 
/meow
